assumptions: No New Relic account or license key exists.
A terminal with cURL and gzip is available.

developer_goal: Create a New Relic account, copy a license key, and POST a custom event with cURL.

first_success.outcome: Compressed cURL POST to the Event API returns HTTP 200 with a uuid acknowledgment.
first_success.observable_signal: HTTP 200 JSON includes uuid for the submission.

route_selection.surface: New Relic Event API custom event via cURL
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: New Relic Event API custom event via cURL

candidates.name: New Relic Event API custom event via cURL
candidates.reason: Event API docs invite creating a free account (no credit card) and submitting compressed JSON with curl using Api-Key (license key) to insights-collector.newrelic.com. Prefer cURL ingest over installing APM agents for first API success.

required_path.action: Create a New Relic account and open the account UI.
required_path.observable_result: API keys / license key settings reachable.

required_path.action: Copy the ingest license key for the account.
POST a gzip-compressed JSON event array to https://insights-collector.newrelic.com/v1/accounts/EVENTS with Api-Key and Content-Type application/json.
Confirm the 200 acknowledgment uuid (optionally NRQL SELECT * FROM YOUR_CUSTOM_EVENT later).

prerequisites.description: New Relic account (free; no credit card required per Event API page).

sources.title: Send custom events with our Event API

uncertainties.question: Exact path segment for EVENTS vs account-scoped URL in current curl samples.
uncertainties.impact: Request URL may include account id variants.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Docs show Linux/bash examples behind UI toggles; regional hosts are explicit.
